info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

get.description: Returns statistical aggregations of table data based on specified functions and grouping criteria

total.description: Aggregations by all data in field

group.description: Aggregations by grouped data in field

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Returns the total number of rows in a view based on applied filters and criteria

schema.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.

parameters.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.
parameters.name: viewId

schema.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc

parameters.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc
parameters.name: ignoreViewQuery

schema.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

parameters.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.
parameters.name: filter

schema.description: Search for records that match the specified field and value

parameters.description: Search for records that match the specified field and value
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Filter out the records that can be selected by a given link cell from the relational table. For example, if the specified field is one to many or one to one relationship, recordId for which the field has already been selected will not appear.

parameters.description: Filter out the records that can be selected by a given link cell from the relational table. For example, if the specified field is one to many or one to one relationship, recordId for which the field has already been selected will not appear.
parameters.name: filterLinkCellCandidate

schema.description: Filter out selected records based on this link cell from the relational table. Note that viewId, filter, and orderBy will not take effect in this case because selected records has it own order. Ignoring recordId gets all the selected records for the field

parameters.description: Filter out selected records based on this link cell from the relational table. Note that viewId, filter, and orderBy will not take effect in this case because selected records has it own order. Ignoring recordId gets all the selected records for the field
parameters.name: filterLinkCellSelected

schema.description: Filter selected records by record ids

parameters.description: Filter selected records by record ids
parameters.name: selectedRecordIds

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation/row-count?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation/row-count?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

200.description: Calendar daily collection for the view

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation/record-index?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&recordId=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'
